data.title: Brainstorm Phase 3 assumes new epic creation — should handle enriching existing epics
data.description: When /dso:brainstorm is invoked with an existing epic ID (e.g., brainstorming an underdefined epic), Phase 3 (Ticket Integration) Step 1 instructs 'Create the Epic' using ticket create. But the epic already exists — the correct behavior should be to update the existing epic's description and priority via ticket edit. Currently the skill has no conditional path for 'epic already exists, enrich it' vs 'no epic yet, create one'. This caused confusion during brainstorming of epic 9832-0fc4 where the orchestrator had to manually use ticket edit instead of following the skill's Phase 3 instructions literally.
